data.title: SolarEdge Technologies (SEDG) Stock Is Down 19%: What's Going On?
data.description: SolarEdge Technologies shares are trading lower by 19.4% during Thursday's session. The company earlier announced that Marcel Gani has resigned from its Board of Directors, effective April 8.

data.title: Why Marin Software (MRIN) Stock Is Down 50%
data.description: Marin Software shares are trading lower by 50.8% during Thursday's session. The company announced plans for dissolution, which its board of directors has approved.

data.title: TSMC Triggers Death Cross As Trump Tariff Threats Add To Investor Concerns
data.description: TSM has seen a 25% decline in stock value and a Death Cross pattern, while President Trump's recent threats of a 100% tax on the company add to the negative outlook. Investors may find more stability in ETFs such as SPY, SOXX, and SMH.
